name: Kailash Narayana Prasad
skills: Cybersecurity (Network Security, Web Security, OWASP Top 10, Vulnerability Assessment, Penetration Testing basics)
Cryptography (Encryption/Decryption, Hashing, Digital Signatures, Public Key Infrastructure)
Blockchain (Decentralization, Consensus Mechanisms, Smart Contracts basics)
my_twin: I would want to track how I make decisions while solving problems, especially in situations involving security and logical reasoning. Sometimes I notice that I either overthink and delay action or act quickly without fully analyzing risks. I want to understand what triggers these patterns—whether it's pressure, complexity, or uncertainty. I’m also curious about how I approach identifying vulnerabilities, both in systems and in my own thinking. By observing this, I want to improve my ability to think like both a builder and an attacker, making my decisions more precise, balanced, and effective over time.
